hooks.command: cmd=$(node -e "const chunks=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(chunks.join(''));const cmd=j&&j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command||'';process.stdout.write(cmd)}catch(e){}})"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then if ! npm run lint; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Lint failed — fix errors before committing"}'; exit 1; fi; fi
